billable.description: Indicates if the time entry is billable or not

customFieldValues.description: Values for custom fields related to the time entry

description.description: Description or notes about the time entry

id.description: Unique identifier for the time entry

isLocked.description: Indicates if the time entry is locked or not

kioskId.description: Identifier for the kiosk associated with the time entry

projectId.description: Unique identifier for the project related to the time entry

tagIds.description: Identifiers of tags associated with the time entry

taskId.description: Unique identifier for the task related to the time entry

timeInterval.description: Represents the time interval for the time entry

end.description: End timestamp of the time entry

start.description: Start timestamp of the time entry

type.description: Type of the time entry (e.g., time, leave, holiday)

userId.description: Unique identifier for the user associated with the time entry

workspaceId.description: Unique identifier for the workspace of the time entry
